name: Arundel Firearms & Pawn
description_short: Arundel Firearms & Pawn is a Maryland-based retailer specializing in firearms, ammunition, tactical gear, and pawn services. Located in Glen Burnie, they offer an extensive inventory of handguns, rifles, shotguns, and accessories.
description_long:
Arundel Firearms & Pawn LLC operates as a specialized firearms retailer and pawn shop in Glen Burnie, Maryland. The business combines two service models: retail sales of firearms and shooting-related equipment, plus traditional pawn shop services that allow customers to use valuable items as collateral for loans. This dual-business model positions them as a community resource for both enthusiasts and those seeking quick access to cash.

The company maintains a comprehensive inventory spanning multiple categories. Their product range includes handguns (semi-automatic, revolvers, derringers, bolt action), rifles (bolt action, lever action, pump action, semi-automatic), shotguns (over-under, side-by-side, pump action, semi-automatic), black powder firearms, and an extensive selection of accessories. Beyond firearms, they stock optics, reloading supplies, ammunition, cleaning equipment, tactical gear, knives, holsters, gun safes, and survival equipment. Featured brands include Sig Sauer, Remington Firearms, Winchester, Zastava, and Sako. They advertise in-store sales including 22% off .22 ammunition and 20% off single-shot shotguns.

The business differentiates itself through several operational features. They announce upcoming Cerakoting services (firearm finishing), indicating expansion into gunsmithing capabilities. Their website structure shows sophisticated retail organization with detailed category hierarchies. Operating hours are limited to Tuesday-Friday 10am-5pm and Saturday 10am-3pm, suggesting a small, focused operation. They explicitly require age verification (18+) at website entry, demonstrating compliance awareness. The 7427 Baltimore Annapolis Boulevard location serves the Glen Burnie area with a local phone number (410) 761-6381.

As a pawn shop and firearms retailer, Arundel Firearms serves enthusiasts seeking specific inventory and customers needing quick collateral-based loans. The limited operating hours and specialized focus mean this is not a high-volume, convenience-oriented business. Consumers should understand that pawn loans require physical collateral, involve interest costs, and operate under different regulations than traditional lending. The business's long-term stability and specific terms (loan duration, APR, redemption policies) cannot be assessed from the website alone.
address: 7427 Baltimore Annapolis Blvd, Glen Burnie, MD 21061

company_info.headquarters: 7427 Baltimore Annapolis Blvd, Glen Burnie, MD 21061

pros: Extensive specialized inventory: 25+ product categories from firearms to tactical gear, optics, ammunition, and reloading supplies
Named brand selection: Carries established manufacturers like Sig Sauer, Remington, Winchester, Zastava, and Sako
Upcoming Cerakoting services indicate expansion into gunsmithing and custom firearm finishing
Dual-business model provides both retail and pawn loan options in one location
Active promotion of in-store sales (22% off .22 ammo, 20% off shotguns as of current listing)
Compliant age verification requirement (18+) demonstrates responsible retail practices
Local, established business with dedicated phone line and consistent operating hours
cons: Very limited hours: Closed Sunday-Monday, only 10am-5pm weekdays and 10am-3pm Saturday—difficult for working customers
No information about pawn loan terms, APR rates, loan duration, or redemption policies available on website
Pawn loans require physical collateral and involve interest costs, not suitable for unsecured credit needs
Small retail operation with no indication of online ordering or shipping capabilities
No customer reviews, ratings, or feedback visible on website
best_for: Firearms enthusiasts and hunters seeking specific gun models, ammunition, and tactical accessories in the Glen Burnie area
Customers with valuable items (firearms, optics, collectibles) needing quick short-term loans against collateral
People seeking specialized firearm services like Cerakoting and custom finishing work
Local community members with flexible schedules who can visit during limited Tuesday-Saturday hours
diagnosis: Arundel Firearms & Pawn is best for firearms enthusiasts and collectors in the Glen Burnie area seeking specialized inventory, and for individuals with valuable collateral who need quick short-term loans. The main caveat is that pawn loans are collateral-based, time-limited borrowing with interest costs—not suitable for unsecured credit needs—and the business's very limited operating hours (closed Sun-Mon, 10am-5pm Tue-Fri, 10am-3pm Sat) severely limit accessibility for most working customers.
services: Firearms retail: handguns, rifles, shotguns, and black powder firearms
Ammunition sales: handgun, rifle, rimfire, and shotgun ammunition
Optics and sighting equipment: scopes, red dots, night vision optics, rangefinders, binoculars
Reloading supplies and equipment: powder, primers, projectiles, presses, dies, cases
Tactical and shooting gear: holsters, magazine pouches, slings, body armor, range bags
Firearm storage and security: safes, hard cases, soft cases, lockable storage accessories
Cleaning and maintenance supplies: solvents, lubricants, brushes, cleaning kits, rods
Firearm parts and accessories: barrels, triggers, rails, stocks, grips, muzzle devices
NFA/suppressor products: suppressors, short-barreled rifles, short-barreled shotguns
Knives and tools: fixed blade, folding blade, multi-tools, machetes, axes
Pawn loans: collateral-based short-term loans against valuable items
Cerakoting services: firearm finishing and custom coating (announced as 'coming soon')
